faq.question: <p>When the return air is dropped to floor level what is the advantage?</p>
faq.answer: <p>This will product a more even temperature in the trailer and also helps to prevent short cycling of the unit.</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Why should I use a Return Air Bulkhead?</p>
faq.answer: <p>To drop the return air to the floor level</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>What is the typical lead time after I place an order?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Return Air Bulkheads are kept in stock ready to fill your order.</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Can I drop ship directly to my customer?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Yes you may drop ship directly to your customer’s location.</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Can they ship via UPS?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Return Air Bulkheads can only go LTL (Less than a truckload)</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>How are the Return Air Bulkheads shipped?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Return Air Bulkheads will be shipped on a pallet. (Only up to 2 can ship without a pallet)</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Will the DuroMax fit flush with a protruding mount unit?</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>What are the weights of the different types of Return Air Bulkheads?</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>What are the different styles of the Return Air Bulkheads that ITW Insulated Products offers?</p>
faq.answer: <p>ITW Insulated has three Return Air Bulkheads available; the DuroMax, Airhead and the Maxair.</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Do I have to order a special size Return Air Bulkhead?</p>
faq.answer: <p>All of ITW Insulated Plastic Return Air bulkheads are universal and will fit the inside width and height of your trailer front wall.</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Will the Single Temp Return Air Bulkheads protect the front wall and refrigeration unit from damage?</p>
faq.answer: <p>Yes, the Return Air Bulkheads protect the front wall and refrigeration unit while promoting positive air circulation back into evaporator of the refrigeration unit.</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products

faq.question: <p>Will the Return Air Bulkheads work for a multi temp application?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The Return Air Bulkheads are recommended for a single temp application.</p>
faq.catdescription: Return Air Bulkhead FAQs from ITW Insulated Products
